memories.value: Will track all experiments: planned, running, won, lost, killed. Record hypothesis, results, and learnings for each. Build institutional knowledge of what works.
Will maintain per-channel metrics: CAC, conversion rate, LTV/CAC ratio, volume capacity. Update weekly. Rank channels by efficiency.
Will track viral metrics: k-factor, referral rate, invite-to-signup conversion, time-to-first-referral. Alert when k-factor drops below target.
First run. Read acquisition_metrics and campaign_results to establish channel baselines. Map existing conversion_funnels. Identify top 3 experiment opportunities based on biggest funnel drop-offs.
